title: OSPF: R20 Process 20, Router-ID Loopback0, Interface-based Areas, /18 Summary (Area 40)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: OSPF is preconfigured on all devices except R20. Configure R20 to complete these tasks.

Task 1: Configure OSPF according to the topology using these requirements: (1) Use Process ID 20. (2) Use Loopback0 for the Router ID. (3) Advertise all networks into OSPF — do NOT use network statements under the OSPF process to accomplish this task.
Task 2: Configure a /18 summary route for Area 40.
hints: R20'de 'show run int lo0' ile Loopback0 adresinin 10.0.1.20 olup olmadığını doğrula; router-id bu adres olmalı.
Network statement YASAK: OSPF'i 'ip ospf 20 area X' ile interface altında etkinleştir.
answer_key_raw:
R20:
R20> enable
R20# configure terminal
R20(config)# router ospf 20
R20(config-router)# router-id 10.0.1.20
R20(config-router)# area 40 range 10.40.0.0 255.255.192.0
R20(config-router)# exit
R20(config)# interface range loopback0,Ethernet0/0-1
R20(config-if-range)# ip ospf 20 area 0
R20(config-if-range)# interface Ethernet0/2
R20(config-if)# ip ospf 20 area 40
R20(config-if)# end
R20# write
explanation: Network statement yasak olduğu için OSPF, interface altında 'ip ospf <pid> area <alan>' ile etkinleştirilir: Area 0'a bakan Lo0, e0/0, e0/1 ve Area 40'a bakan e0/2. Router ID, Loopback0 adresi (10.0.1.20) olarak elle verilir. /18 özet (255.255.192.0) ABR olan R20'de 'area 40 range' komutuyla yapılır — özet daima kaynağın bağlı olduğu alan için ABR'de tanımlanır.
